documents.title: Welcome Product Brief
documents.content:
Welcome to Ajaia Docs Lite

This prototype supports document creation, rich text editing, saving, reopening, file import, and basic sharing.

  • Use the toolbar for formatting.
  • Upload a .txt or .md file to turn it into a document.
  • Share an owned document with another seeded user.

documents.title: sample import
documents.content:
Imported Project Notes

This sample file can be uploaded into Ajaia Docs Lite.

  • It becomes a new editable document.
  • Markdown headings are converted to rich-text headings.
  • Simple bullet lists are preserved.

Next steps:

  1. Edit this imported document.
  2. Save it.
  3. Share it with another seeded user.
